title: Alex's Spelunkered Immersive Ores
description: Now Spelunker potions and Ruby Armor from Mythic Upgrades can detect the ores from Immersive Ores too.
body:
Now Spelunker potions and Ruby Armor from [Mythic Upgrades](https://modrinth.com/mod/mythic-upgrades) can detect the ores from [Immersive Ores](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-ores) too.

This mod is not only limited to these mods.
Any mod that has anything to do with the ores, and work with other ores but not the ones from [Immersive Ores](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-ores) and wasn't affecting them - Now it will work.

NOTE: The datapack can only detect ore blocks not raw blocks.
